trivia_bullets.text: Green Spider uncommon (MKM, no. 162, February 9, 2024), illustrated by Tuan Duong Chu. {5}{G}{G} 3/3 Reach with enter-trigger: distribute three +1/+1 counters across up to three creatures, then gain life equal to greatest toughness you control.

"The spider just loved how the gems twinkled, and the high-class prey they attracted." Spider uses jewels as lures — a predator decorating its web to attract desirable victims; transposed onto Ravnica's upscale-crime milieu.

Life-gain calculation: trigger reads 'greatest toughness among creatures you control' — counter distribution order matters since placing counters before reading toughness can raise the ceiling. Noted in MKM Release Notes.
Spider type is unusual for Ravnica; art places it in vine-covered ruins rather than wilderness, reinforcing Ravnica's urban ecology and MKM's integration of horror fauna into a city-crime setting.

related_cards.name: Get a Leg Up
related_cards.note: same color/set; green counter engine that pairs with Glint Weaver's ETB distribution

related_cards.name: Webweaver Changeling
related_cards.note: Spider type historical cluster; reach + web predator archetype
